description_long: This object is a computer monitor with a distinctly polygonal, nearly circular shape, featuring a uniform matte surface in a muted taupe color. The bezel is thick and consistent around the perimeter, with no visible decorative elements, buttons, or branding. The monitor appears to lack a visible stand or base, suggesting it may be designed for wall mounting or is missing its support. There are no visible ports, controls, or screen details, and the surface is entirely flat and featureless. The overall design is minimalist, with no textural or color contrast. The object gives the impression of a solid, monolithic display unit.
description: A polygonal, taupe-colored computer monitor with a thick, uniform bezel and a flat, featureless surface. No stand, buttons, ports, or branding are visible.
description_view_0: The monitor is seen from the front, showing a flat, polygonal face with a uniform taupe color and no visible features.
description_view_1: The monitor is viewed from a slightly rotated angle, but still shows the same flat, featureless polygonal surface.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, maintaining the same flat, taupe-colored polygonal face with no distinguishing marks.
description_view_3: The monitor is seen from yet another angle, again displaying a uniform, flat surface with no visible stand or controls.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thick, uniform, and polygonal, matching the taupe color of the rest of the monitor. There are no visible decorative elements, color contrasts, or rounded corners.
attribute_stand_type: No stand or base is visible; the monitor appears to lack any support structure.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any edge or surface.
